keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY PALATE. Palate : Aur., Bell., Merc., Nux-v., Pho. Palate, hard : Bell., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho. Palate, soft : Ap., Merc-c., Merc-i-f., Merc. Palate, soft, rim : Merc-i-f. Palate, soft (uvula) : Ap., Merc-c. Palate, dry : Pho-ac. Palate, sore : Aru-t., Bell., Caust., Iris., Lach., Merc., Nit-ac., Nux-v., Pho., Phyt. Palate, swelled : Ap., Arg-m., Lach. Palate, swelled, uvula : Ap. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
